name: Stuffed Sea Bass
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients except sea bass and olive oil.
2. Cut three diagonal slits on each side of the fish.
3. Place one tablespoon of stuffing mixture in each slit.
4. Fill the cavity of the fish with the remaining stuffing mixture.
5. Place the fish in an ungreased 12x7-1/2 inch baking dish.
6. Drizzle with olive oil.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
